address_evidence.evidence: SM Mall of Asia is identified at Seaside Blvd, Pasay City.
SM Mall of Asia is identified at Seaside Blvd., Pasay City, Philippines and the page exposes multiple sublocation labels.

target.sublocation_warning: Public sources mix the whole SM Mall of Asia complex, Main Mall, Entertainment Mall, South Arcade, North/South Parking Buildings, MOA Square, SMX Convention Center, MOA Arena, SM By the Bay, and tenant spaces. Manual requests must name the exact subscope.

global_safety_rule: This learning run does not prove SM Mall of Asia is NSCP-compliant, structurally safe, fire-safe, fit for occupancy, permitted, unpermitted, compliant, or noncompliant. It maps public document availability and manual request targets.

document_targets.document_target: Unified Application Form for Building Permit
document_targets.likely_custodian: Pasay City Engineer's Office / Office of the Building Official via XERSYS or OSSCPAS
document_targets.target_specific_result: The form name is public as a Pasay OBO requirement, but no SM Mall of Asia target-tied application form was found.
document_targets.manual_follow_up: Request the building-permit application packet for the exact SM MOA subscope from Pasay CEO/OBO or the owner/operator.
document_targets.overclaim_boundary: A public form requirement does not prove that a target application exists, was approved, or is current.

document_targets.likely_custodian: Pasay City Engineer's Office / Office of the Building Official
document_targets.target_specific_result: Pasay XERSYS publicly describes application, claim stub, payment, and release workflow, but no public issued SM MOA building permit or permit number was found.
document_targets.manual_follow_up: Request certified copy or verification of the issued building permit for the exact building, renovation, repair, fit-out, or expansion scope.
document_targets.overclaim_boundary: Do not infer permit existence or absence from XERSYS process visibility.

document_targets.document_target: Claim Stub, Order of Payment, and Official Receipt
document_targets.likely_custodian: Pasay CEO/OBO, OSSCPAS, and City Treasurer's Office
document_targets.target_specific_result: These names appear in the Pasay process, but no SM MOA target-specific claim stub, order of payment, or official receipt was found.
document_targets.manual_follow_up: Request only if the audit needs traceability of a specific permit application, payment, or release transaction.
document_targets.overclaim_boundary: Payment or claim-stub process context is administrative; it is not compliance evidence by itself.

document_targets.likely_custodian: Pasay CEO/OBO, SM Prime / SM Supermalls, and engineer of record
document_targets.target_specific_result: Pasay process lists Civil/Structural plans as part of building and design plans, but no public target-tied SM MOA plan sheets were found.
document_targets.manual_follow_up: Request approved civil/structural plans and identify the exact building, parking structure, wing, tenant, or expansion scope.
document_targets.overclaim_boundary: A contractor or operator page may identify design participation, but not the approved plan set.

document_targets.likely_custodian: Pasay CEO/OBO, SM Prime / SM Supermalls, and civil/structural engineer of record
document_targets.target_specific_result: Pasay process lists structural design analysis and computations for two-storey and above projects, but no SM MOA target-tied signed/sealed computation packet was found.
document_targets.manual_follow_up: Request signed and sealed structural design analysis and computations for the exact target subscope.
document_targets.overclaim_boundary: No NSCP compliance conclusion is available without the target-tied computation, review, or authoritative record.

document_targets.likely_custodian: Pasay CEO/OBO, SM Prime / SM Supermalls, geotechnical consultant, and civil/structural engineer of record
document_targets.target_specific_result: Pasay process lists boring/soil test for two-storey with deck and above; public corporate/operator sources mention geotechnical engineering and deep-pile foundations, but no actual SM MOA boring/soil report was found.
document_targets.manual_follow_up: Request geotechnical investigation, boring logs, soil test report, and related signed/sealed professional documents.
document_targets.overclaim_boundary: Geotechnical narrative is not the same as the actual soil investigation report.

document_targets.target_specific_result: Pasay process says plans/documents are evaluated using a Compliance Evaluation Sheet, but no SM MOA target-tied sheet was found.
document_targets.manual_follow_up: Request the OBO evaluation sheet for the exact permit, renovation, repair, or expansion application.
document_targets.overclaim_boundary: The existence of an evaluation step does not prove the target plan was approved or compliant.

document_targets.likely_custodian: BFP Pasay City Fire Marshal and Pasay CEO/OBO
document_targets.target_specific_result: JMC 2018-01 and Pasay process context confirm FSEC is a real permit prerequisite, but no public SM MOA target-tied FSEC was found.
document_targets.manual_follow_up: Request FSEC copy or verification for the exact building, renovation, fit-out, or expansion scope from BFP Pasay and Pasay OBO.
document_targets.overclaim_boundary: BFP service presence at SM MOA does not prove a current FSEC for any particular SM MOA structure.

document_targets.likely_custodian: BFP Pasay City Fire Marshal, BFP satellite office at SM MOA if record-routing is accepted, and Pasay BPLO/OBO
document_targets.target_specific_result: Public sources show BFP Pasay has a satellite office at SM MOA and provides inspection/permit/renewal assistance, but no public SM MOA FSIC copy, number, or issuance date was found.
document_targets.manual_follow_up: Request FSIC copy or verification from BFP Pasay for the exact building or tenant scope and relevant year.
document_targets.overclaim_boundary: Do not claim fire-safety compliance from BFP presence, events, drills, or public service access.

document_targets.likely_custodian: Pasay CEO/OBO and SM Prime / SM Supermalls owner records
document_targets.target_specific_result: National and local process context identifies certificate-of-occupancy requirements, but no public target-tied SM MOA certificate of occupancy was found.
document_targets.manual_follow_up: Request certificate of occupancy for the exact building, wing, parking building, or expansion scope.
document_targets.overclaim_boundary: Opening, mall hours, tenant operation, or foot traffic do not prove occupancy certificate status.

document_targets.likely_custodian: Pasay CEO/OBO, owner/operator, contractor, architect, or civil engineer in charge of construction
document_targets.target_specific_result: JMC 2018-01 identifies Certificate of Completion as part of occupancy processing, but no public SM MOA target-tied certificate of completion was found.
document_targets.manual_follow_up: Request notarized, signed/sealed Certificate of Completion and related approved/as-built plans for the exact scope.
document_targets.overclaim_boundary: Company statements about completion or opening are not the same as the formal certificate.

document_targets.document_target: Approved Plans, As-Built Plans, Occupancy Inspection, Professional License Attachments
document_targets.likely_custodian: Pasay CEO/OBO, SM Prime / SM Supermalls, contractor, architect, and civil/structural engineer of record
document_targets.target_specific_result: These documents are defined by national/local occupancy process context, but no SM MOA target-tied public packet was found.
document_targets.manual_follow_up: Request approved plans/specifications, as-built plans if modified, construction logbook, inspection records, and professional license/PTR attachments.
document_targets.overclaim_boundary: Professional identity or corporate claims do not substitute for the occupancy packet.

document_targets.likely_custodian: Pasay CEO/OBO, Pasay BPLO, and owner/operator records
document_targets.target_specific_result: Pasay process context indicates annual building inspection is a real document route, but no public SM MOA target-tied annual inspection certificate or permit was found.
document_targets.manual_follow_up: Request annual building inspection certificate/permit for the exact year and exact SM MOA subscope.
document_targets.overclaim_boundary: Business-permit renewal or mall operation does not prove annual inspection status.

document_targets.likely_custodian: Pasay CEO/OBO, owner/operator, and signed/sealed civil/structural engineer of record
document_targets.target_specific_result: Pasay process context surfaced this document as an annual-inspection-related item, but no public SM MOA target-tied certificate was found.
document_targets.manual_follow_up: Request signed/sealed structural stability and safety certificate for the exact building, structure, or expansion.
document_targets.overclaim_boundary: Old public advisories or operator resilience narratives cannot replace a signed/sealed current certificate.

document_targets.document_target: Post-Incident Structural Assessment, Repair Permit, Retrofit Permit, Reoccupancy Clearance, Closure/Tag Records
document_targets.likely_custodian: Pasay CEO/OBO, Pasay CDRRMO, BFP Pasay, SM Prime / SM Supermalls, and relevant professional of record
document_targets.target_specific_result: Public sources include old target-specific advisories/incidents, including a 2020 Pasay Engineering Office statement reposted by SM Prime and fire/ceiling incident reports, but no underlying official assessment, repair permit, retrofit permit, closure order, tag record, or reoccupancy clearance was found.
document_targets.manual_follow_up: Request the underlying inspection or incident records for the exact date, event, and sublocation.
document_targets.overclaim_boundary: Incident reports and reopening/operation do not prove current safety, compliance, or repair completion.

document_targets.document_target: Corporate Material Permits and Licenses Table / Business Permit Entries
document_targets.likely_custodian: SM Prime investor relations / corporate compliance and Pasay BPLO for official copies
document_targets.target_specific_result: SM Prime's 2025 offer supplement lists SM Mall of Asia business permit entries in Pasay City with permit/license numbers and dates, but it does not attach official BPLO certificates or building/occupancy records.
document_targets.manual_follow_up: Use the listed numbers as leads when requesting official BPLO records or source documents behind the filing.
document_targets.overclaim_boundary: Business permit entries are not the same as building permits, occupancy certificates, FSIC/FSEC, or NSCP compliance records.

document_targets.likely_custodian: SM Prime / SM Supermalls corporate communications, sustainability, engineering, and compliance teams
document_targets.target_specific_result: SM Prime public materials describe MOA Complex engineering, including geotechnical and structural measures, but these are operator statements rather than signed/sealed engineering records or OBO records.
document_targets.manual_follow_up: Request the underlying engineering documents, inspection reports, professional sign-offs, or OBO/BFP records that support the public narrative.
document_targets.overclaim_boundary: Operator resilience claims are useful leads, not compliance certification.

agent_results.best_public_result: Pasay publishes the process and XERSYS workflow, but no target-tied SM MOA building permit packet was found.
agent_results.manual_custodian: Pasay CEO/OBO and SM Prime / SM Supermalls

agent_results.best_public_result: Pasay process names the structural documents; SM/third-party sources provide engineering leads, but no signed/sealed structural packet was found.
agent_results.manual_custodian: Pasay CEO/OBO, SM Prime / SM Supermalls, and engineer/geotechnical consultant of record

agent_results.best_public_result: Certificate-of-occupancy packet requirements are public process context, but no SM MOA target-tied occupancy packet was found.
agent_results.manual_custodian: Pasay CEO/OBO, BFP Pasay, CPDO, and owner/operator records

agent_results.best_public_result: BFP Pasay has a target-site service presence at SM MOA, but no public target-tied FSEC, FSIC, correction sheet, or inspection record was found.
agent_results.manual_custodian: BFP Pasay City Fire Marshal and SM MOA BFP Satellite Office if it accepts record-routing requests

agent_results.best_public_result: Public advisories and incident reports exist, but no underlying annual inspection, repair, retrofit, closure, tag, or reoccupancy record was found.
agent_results.manual_custodian: Pasay CEO/OBO, BFP Pasay, Pasay CDRRMO, SM Prime / SM Supermalls

agent_results.best_public_result: SM Prime filings provide partial business-permit and operator evidence, but not primary OBO/BFP/occupancy/structural records.
agent_results.manual_custodian: SM Prime investor relations / corporate compliance and the relevant LGU/BFP issuing office

query_patterns_that_worked: site:pasay.gov.ph "Building Permit" "Office of the Building Official" "Unified Application Form"
"SM Mall of Asia" FSIC BFP Pasay
key_learning: Gate 3 should start from exact document targets, not vague compliance language. Public web commonly reveals process forms and some corporate/operator leads, while primary target-tied building, occupancy, fire-safety, and structural records usually require manual request to OBO, BFP, BPLO, owner/operator, or professional-of-record custodians.
